title: When Was Deodorant Invented? A Complete History
meta_description: When was deodorant invented? Discover the full history — from ancient Egypt to the first commercial deodorant in 1888 — and why natural formulas are better.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, a vintage open book or aged illustrated almanac laid flat on a smooth natural slate stone surface, its yellowed pages showing hand-drawn botanical illustrations evoking an era of early personal care rituals, with one roll-on deodorant bottle — Calming Lavender variant, described exactly as it appears in the reference image with its specific cap type — standing upright beside the open book as a modern natural counterpart, a small sprig of organic lavender resting lightly across the page as the only botanical prop, on a smooth natural slate stone surface outdoors on a garden table, blurred green garden foliage in soft bokeh behind, bright natural diffused daylight with a slight dappled shadow, low 20-degree angle shot, landscape banner crop, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
